title: A Friend in Need
scenario: A close college friend calls in a panic and asks to borrow ₹50,000 to cover a medical bill, promising to repay 'in a couple of months'. You have ₹80,000 sitting in your emergency fund. Saying no feels harsh, but lending could leave you exposed.

choices.label: Offer a smaller ₹10,000 gift you can absorb, and help them find a proper source for the rest
choices.lesson: Lend only what you can afford to lose; gifting a smaller, fixed sum protects both the friendship and your safety net.

choices.label: Hand over the full ₹50,000 from your emergency fund on a verbal promise
choices.lesson: Draining your emergency fund on an informal loan leaves you one crisis away from debt, and unpaid loans often end friendships.
